/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/openclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/openclaw_msgs/msg/_task_status_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build/openclaw_msgs:/opt/ros/rolling/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_buffer.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/rolling/lib
